reforms.description: Norway has implemented a range of supports for innovative and research-oriented businesses, including grants for young growth companies, innovation loans, and business-oriented research support. Additionally, the country supports pilot and demonstration projects through the environmental technology scheme, which fosters innovation in green technologies, including carbon-capture and storage (CCS) projects. Enova SF plays a key role in supporting the development of zero-emission transport technologies and emissions reduction technologies in manufacturing and energy sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance innovation and technology adoption, which are expected to raise productivity and support economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been put into practice and are currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant but narrower changes aimed at supporting innovation and addressing climate challenges.
reforms.source_quote: Norway is supporting pilot and demonstration projects broadly through the environmental technology scheme (Innovation Norway), and technology adoption and carbon-capture and storage (CCS) projects.
